---
title: "The Students\' Handbook of Comparative Grammar, applied to the Sanskrit, Zend, Greek, Latin, Gothic, Anglo-Saxon, and English Languages"
---

## The Students\' Handbook of Comparative Grammar, applied to the Sanskrit, Zend, Greek, Latin, Gothic, Anglo-Saxon, and English Languages

**Author:** The Rev. Thomas Clark
**Date:** 1862
**Imprint:** London: Longman

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
